message:
fix(indexer): include analytics tables in storage reset and add test coverage

Expand reset_storage() to also clear usage_models_daily, usage_daily,
usage_hourly, token_daily_stats, daily_stats, message_metrics, and
token_usage tables that were previously missed during full reindexing.

Adds test assertions verifying daily_stats and usage_daily are properly
cleared alongside messages and FTS data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
